title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Sports Authority India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Sports Authority India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Sports Authority India in Coimbatore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Sports Authority India:
Sports Authority India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sports Authority India!
